HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT NADINE MELO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT NADINE MELO'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NADINE MELO HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SASSER, JAKE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MELO, NADINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1578 NEWHALL STREET, STAYED UNTIL DEC-31-2007, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC FOR COMPLETE DETAILS
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: ANSWER WAS STRICKEN AND THERE ARE NO OTHER FILINGS TO STRIKE.
FEE PAID FOR FIRST FILING FILED BY DEFENDANT MELO, NADINE
